description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a large, boxy black barrel assembly and a metallic receiver. The receiver is silver-gray with visible screws and mechanical details, while the grip is made of dark brown wood or wood-textured material, ergonomically shaped for handheld use. The front of the barrel is wide and cylindrical, suggesting a high-caliber or specialized ammunition. The top of the barrel and receiver are equipped with rail mounts for attachments, and the rear sight is visible. The trigger and trigger guard are prominent, with the guard being metallic and slightly squared. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A tactical shotgun with a large black barrel, metallic receiver, and ergonomic wooden grip, featuring rail mounts and a prominent trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cylindrical barrel opening, metallic receiver top, and partial sight alignment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden grip, metallic receiver with screws, and the full length of the black barrel with rail mounts.
description_view_2: Barrel-end view focusing on the large, circular muzzle and the sight rail above.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the wooden grip, metallic receiver, and the detailed structure of the barrel and mounting rails.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, large cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, metallic, medium-sized with a robust frame and no finger grooves
